name: Coalescence
ranks:
When active, grants a slight
increase to elemental attack
and status buildup.

When active, grants an
increase to elemental attack
and status buildup.

When active, grants a large
increase to elemental attack
and status buildup.

name: Antivirus
ranks:
Slightly increases recovery rate
after contracting the Frenzy.
Affinity +3% if cured.

Increases recovery rate after
contracting the Frenzy.
Affinity +6% if cured.

Greatly increases recovery rate
after contracting the Frenzy.
Affinity +10% if cured.

name: Recovery Speed
ranks:
Doubles the speed at which
you heal recoverable damage.

Triples the speed at which
you heal recoverable damage.

Quadruples the speed at
which you heal recoverable
damage.

name: Windproof
ranks:
Negates minor wind pressure
and halves the effects of
major wind pressure.

Negates minor and major wind
pressure and halves the effects
of dragon wind pressure.
Negates all kinds of wind pressure.

name: Flayer
ranks:
Makes it ever so slightly easier
to inflict wounds. Also deals
additional non-elemental damage.

Makes it moderately easier to inflict
wounds. Also deals slightly more
additional non-elemental damage.

Makes it easier to inflict wounds.
Also deals moderately more
additional non-elemental damage.

Makes it much easier to inflict
wounds. Also deals more additional
non-elemental damage.

Makes it significantly easier to
inflict wounds. Also deals much more
additional non-elemental damage.

name: Cliffhanger
ranks:
Reduces stamina depletion while
climbing by 50%.

name: Tremor Resistance
ranks:
Nullifies very minor ground tremors
and halves effects of minor ground
tremors.

Nullifies up to minor ground tremors
and greatly reduces the effects of
major ground tremors.

name: Blight Resistance
ranks:
Reduces the duration of all
elemental blights by 50%.

Reduces the duration of all
elemental blights by 75%.

name: Mushroomancer
ranks:
Lets you digest blue mushrooms
and toadstools.

Additionally lets you digest
nitroshrooms and parashrooms.

Additionally lets you digest
mandragoras, devil's blight,
and exciteshrooms.

name: Weakness Exploit
ranks:
Attacks that hit weak points gain
affinity +5%, with an extra 3%
on wounds.

Attacks that hit weak points gain
affinity +10%, with an extra 5%
on wounds.

Attacks that hit weak points gain
affinity +15%, with an extra 10%
on wounds.

Attacks that hit weak points have
20% increased affinity, with an
extra 15% on wounds.

Attacks that hit weak points have
30% increased affinity, with an
extra 20% on wounds.

name: Blindsider
ranks:
Improves the effectiveness of
flash attacks and items.

name: Aquatic/Oilsilt Mobility
ranks:
Negates the effects of muddy streams,
nullifies slowing from water and oilsilt,
and reduces slowing from heavy oil.
Also negates the effects of waves.

name: Sleep Resistance
ranks:
Reduces the duration
of sleep by 30%.

Reduces the duration
of sleep by 60%.

name: Foray
ranks:
Attack +6 against large monsters
affected by poison or paralysis.

Attack +8 and affinity +5%
against large monsters affected
by poison or paralysis.

Attack +10 and affinity +10%
against large monsters affected
by poison or paralysis.

Attack +12 and affinity +15%
against large monsters affected
by poison or paralysis.

Attack +15 and affinity +20%
against large monsters affected
by poison or paralysis.

name: Earplugs
ranks:
Reduces the effects of weak
monster roars.

Nullifies weak monster roars and
reduces the effects of strong
monster roars.

Nullifies weak and strong
monster roars.

name: Counterstrike
ranks:
Attack +15 while active.
Moderately extends effect time.

Attack +25 while active.
Extends effect time.

name: Heroics
ranks:
Attack +30% and defense-increasing
effects are negated while active.

name: Adaptability
ranks: Negates the effects of heat and cold.

name: Paralysis Resistance
ranks:
Reduces the duration
of paralysis by 30%.

Reduces the duration
of paralysis by 60%.

name: Burst
ranks:
On first hit, gain a small temporary
attack and element boost, replaced
by a larger boost after the fifth hit.

Hit 5 successive times for
a moderate stat boost.

Hit 5 successive times for
a bigger stat boost.

Hit 5 successive times for
an even bigger stat boost.

Hit 5 successive times for
a huge stat boost.

name: Geologist
ranks:
One extra item when gathering
from bonepiles.

Additionally adds one extra item
when gathering special items.

Additionally adds one extra item
when gathering from mining
outcrops.

name: Stun Resistance
ranks:
Reduces the duration
of stun by 30%.

Reduces the duration
of stun by 60%.

name: Flinch Free
ranks:
Prevents knockbacks. Tripping is
reduced to a knockback instead.

name: Blast Resistance
ranks:
Delays blastblight and reduces
blast damage.

Greatly delays blastblight and
greatly reduces blast damage.

name: Botanist
ranks:
One extra consumable herb
item per gather.

Additionally adds one extra
consumable fruit, nut, or seed
item per gather.

Additionally adds one extra
consumable insect item per
gather.

Additionally adds one extra
consumable mushroom item
per gather.

name: Wide-Range
ranks:
Items affect nearby allies
with 33% of their efficacy.

Items affect nearby allies
in a wider radius with 33%
of their efficacy.

Items affect nearby allies
in a wider radius with 66%
of their efficacy.

Items affect nearby allies
in a much wider radius with
66% of their efficacy.

Items affect nearby allies
in a much wider radius with
full efficacy.

name: Divine Blessing
ranks:
While active, reduces damage
taken by 15%.

While active, reduces damage
taken by 30%.

While active, reduces damage
taken by 50%.

name: Poison Resistance
ranks:
Reduces the number of times
you take poison damage.

Greatly reduces the number of
times you take poison damage.

name: Partbreaker
ranks:
Increases part damage and
damage dealt when conditions
are met by 10%.

Increases part damage and
damage dealt when conditions
are met by 20%.

Increases part damage and
damage dealt when conditions
are met by 30%.

name: Intimidator
ranks:
Discourages monsters from engaging
you even if you've been spotted.

Highly discourages monsters from
engaging you even if you've
been spotted.

Prevents monsters from engaging
you even if you've been spotted.

name: Elemental Absorption
ranks:
While active, slightly increases
elemental attack, and resistance
to element taken at activation by 4.

While active, moderately increases
elemental attack, and resistance
to element taken at activation by 6.

While active, increases elemental
attack, and resistance to element
taken at activation by 8.

name: Iron Skin
ranks:
Reduces the duration of defense
down by 50%.

Reduces the duration of defense
down by 75%.

name: Latent Power
ranks:
While active, affinity +10%
and reduces stamina
depletion by 30%.

While active, affinity +20%
and reduces stamina
depletion by 30%.

While active, affinity +30%
and reduces stamina
depletion by 50%.

While active, affinity +40%
and reduces stamina
depletion by 50%.

While active, affinity +50%
and reduces stamina
depletion by 50%.

name: Outdoorsman
ranks:
Improves fishing, grilling,
and transporting abilities.

name: Palico Rally
ranks:
Increases Palico attack power
and defense by 5%.

Increases Palico attack power
and defense by 10%.

Increases Palico attack power
and defense by 15%.

Increases Palico attack power
and defense by 20%.

Increases Palico attack power
and defense by 25%.

name: Bind Resistance
ranks:
Allows you to quickly recover from
webbed status or frostblight.

Allows you to very quickly recover
from webbed status or frostblight.

name: Hunger Resistance
ranks:
Extends the time until your
stamina cap reduces by 50%.

Extends the time until your
stamina cap reduces by 100%.

Prevents your stamina cap
from decreasing.

name: Convert Element
ranks:
While active, deals extra dragon damage
after dealing enough elemental damage.
Slightly increases dragon attack.

Increases additional dragon damage
and increases dragon attack.

Further increases additional dragon
damage and greatly increases dragon
attack.
